---
title: "muninn_memory.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\sentinel\muninn_memory.py"
loc: 28
complexity: 2
logic_score: 8.35
style_score: 3.59
intel_score: 7.11
overall_score: 5.47
---

## Intent
The `muninn_memory.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on MuninnMemory, __init__, load_ledger, record_trace. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via MuninnMemory, __init__, load_ledger, record_trace. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 7.1/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [datetime](file://datetime)

### Exports
- `MuninnMemory`
- `__init__`
- `load_ledger`
- `record_trace`
